title: Shadow Chakra Jutsu
description: Introducing the new overpowered apple called the shadow chakra. Eat it, and thou enemy shall regret having had picked a fight.
body:
> _Introducing the new overpowered apple called the shadow chakra. Eat it, and thou enemy shall regret having picked a fight._


### Features: 
1. Added a new craftable item called Shadow Chakra.
1. Eating the item restores hunger, adds 6 effects to the player, summons lightning, and replaces the surrounding blocks with nether rack and liquid blocks with lava.
1. After having eaten a Chakra, anywhere you walk, you will be summoning more lightning.

Brought to you by Alimad Modding & ArmanIsLit
